explanations.pt-br: Importa PyTorch, similaridade de cosseno e as classes HuggingFace necessárias para abrir o GPT-2 real.
explanations.en-us: Import PyTorch, cosine similarity, and the HuggingFace classes needed to inspect the real GPT-2.

explanations.pt-br: Define o modelo, as duas frases comparadas, o token-alvo e carrega tokenizador/modelo em modo eval.
explanations.en-us: Define the model, the two compared phrases, the target token, and load tokenizer/model in eval mode.

explanations.pt-br: decode_tokens revela os tokens BPE reais. Isso é essencial porque GPT-2 trata " people" como token com espaço.
explanations.en-us: decode_tokens reveals the actual BPE tokens. This matters because GPT-2 treats " people" as a token with a leading space.

explanations.pt-br: target_position localiza people ignorando espaços ao redor, preservando a posição real no tensor.
explanations.en-us: target_position locates people while ignoring surrounding whitespace, keeping the real tensor position.

explanations.pt-br: top_next_tokens transforma logits em probabilidades e imprime os tokens mais prováveis para a próxima posição.
explanations.en-us: top_next_tokens converts logits into probabilities and prints the most likely next-position tokens.

explanations.pt-br: run_phrase executa o forward com output_hidden_states e output_attentions, guardando tudo que o raio-X precisa.
explanations.en-us: run_phrase performs the forward pass with output_hidden_states and output_attentions, preserving everything the X-ray needs.

explanations.pt-br: Roda as duas frases, extrai hidden states, posição de people e o vetor-base da camada de embedding.
explanations.en-us: Run both phrases, extract hidden states, the people position, and the layer-0 embedding vector.

explanations.pt-br: Loop camada a camada: o shape permanece igual, enquanto cossenos medem quanto o vetor de people diverge com o contexto.
explanations.en-us: Layer-by-layer loop: shape stays fixed while cosine scores measure how the people vector diverges with context.

explanations.pt-br: Para cada bloco, calcula a atenção média entre heads e mostra para quais tokens o people contextualizado olha.
explanations.en-us: For every block, average attention across heads and show which tokens contextualized people attends to.

explanations.pt-br: Compara top-5 usando uma sonda no embedding inicial contra top-5 após os 12 blocos, conectando vetor contextual a logits.
explanations.en-us: Compare top-5 from an initial-embedding probe against top-5 after 12 blocks, connecting contextual vectors to logits.
